Minoyaki is appreciated for being handmade and hiding centuries-old traditions that inspire local artists. Each piece of dishes is original and its colours are permanent and do not peel off. The design of the spoon is simple, which highlights the material and its quality. It does not contain any metals or other harmful substances. The advantage is the use of a Made in Japan spoon in the dishwasher and in the microwave. items.raw_desc: Ablakkilincs Hoppe Toulon Secustik 7 / 32 - 42 mm, M5 × 45 + 50, 45°, F9, acél / N10A:The Hoppe Toulon luxury window handle features a modern, square design and is available in the attractive F9 steel colour (type /N10A). It has the Secustik function, which makes it difficult for a thief to tamper with the window hardware from the outside thanks to an integrated locking mechanism. It features a VarioFit square with variable length 32-42 mm, a full HOPPE square with variable length 10 mm and smooth adjustment thanks to the integrated compression spring in the crank neck. It offers 45° locking, concealed fixing screws with M5 thread and M5×45 and M5×50 screws are included. The crank body is made of aluminium, the rosette is plastic and the support cams have a 32-42 mm long mandrel. The handle is suitable for both left and right windows and is designed for a square pin with a diameter of 7 mm. Integrated basic security is a matter of course. The product complies with DIN EN ISO 14001 and was manufactured in Europe.                     Key features of window handles Hoppe Toulon Secustik 7 / 32...
